name: HOCH HASF Soccer Intelligence Platform
product_hypothesis: Applying computer vision and AI analytics to youth and amateur soccer videos provides actionable coaching metrics, injury avoidance, and parental insights that traditional scouting lacks.
app_store_positioning: The Ultimate AI Assistant for Soccer Coaches and Parents — track tactical drills, analyze play patterns, and enforce Jayanthi injury boundaries from mobile video uploads.
soccer_intelligence_features: Computer vision tracking of player positioning and spacing mesh
Drill library with tactical movement tutorials
Weekly workload analytics vs age to avoid physical overuse
prediction_risk_disclaimer_requirements: AI prediction data is for athletic development only.
Not a substitute for professional medical/clinical injury diagnoses.
Compliance with local sports betting restrictions (no prediction outcomes sold to gambling operators).

training_education_mode.description: Interactive parent and child onboarding tutorials detailing soccer rules and tactical fundamentals.

data_source_assumptions: Amateur-captured video frame rates of 30-60 FPS
competitive_differentiation: Privacy-focused design: video frame calculations are processed locally on the client's device, never exposing child identification metadata to cloud databases (COPPA zero-data stance).
mvp_readiness_state: Frontend layout and visual enclaves are complete; Supabase backend authentication and Stripe checkout routes are missing.
required_validation: Validate offline computer vision processing performance on mobile nodes
